name: Cloud Brownies
recipeIngredient: 4 Jars Baby Food Pureed Prunes (2.5 oz.) -or-
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly coat a 9" x 13" x 2-inch metal baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites and eggs with the sugar until pale and slightly thickened. Beat in the prunes and vanilla until smooth.
3. In a medium bowl, sift the flour with the cocoa and coffee powder, then fold into the mixture until well-combined. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the brownies are set in the center. Remove from the oven and cool on a rack.
5. When thoroughly cool, cut into 1-inch squares and serve.
These brownies use pureed prunes as a substitute for butter, resulting in moist and delicious treats that can be prepared up to two days ahead of time. Store in an airtight container or freeze for future use. Yield: 48 small squares.
